_doc: Feature-centric view: every signal that contributes to each feature's score. For repeatable signals (see signal-types.json), final contribution = base × log₂(count + 1). For boolean signals, final contribution = base. Universal signals add base × 0.4 to ALL features; repeatable universals are also log-scaled before the 0.4× multiplier. Signal names match simulator (canonical).

ai-models.name: Better AI Models

universalSignals._note: Each universal signal contributes its weight × 0.4 to this feature. Repeatable universals get log-scaled first.

contextLayers.mindsetVector: High in: Engineering|internal (2), Student|internal (2), Product|internal (2). Low in: Sales|high-external (0), Marketing|high-external (0).
contextLayers.promptSynthesis: LLM scores 0-5 based on prompt content. High for: editing-heavy, quality-focused, AI-related prompts.

ai-models.typicalScenario: User is heavily editing slides, regenerating deck, struggling with quality. Log-scaling on text-edit + undo-redo replaces old edit-streak-3 / edit-count-5 aggregates.

brand-kit.name: Brand Kit

universalSignals._note: Each universal signal contributes its weight × 0.4 to this feature. Repeatable universals get log-scaled first.

contextLayers.mindsetVector: High in: Design|high-external (5), Creator|high-external (4), Marketing|high-external (4). Low in: Engineering|internal (0), Finance|internal (0).
contextLayers.promptSynthesis: LLM scores 0-5. High for: brand identity, portfolio, agency credentials, design-focused prompts.

brand-kit.typicalScenario: User mentions their brand, changes themes/styles/media, switches decks, works across multiple decks.

unbranded.name: Remove Watermark

universalSignals._note: Each universal signal contributes its weight × 0.4 to this feature. Repeatable universals get log-scaled first.

contextLayers.mindsetVector: High in: Design|high-external (4), Sales|high-external (4), Marketing|high-external (4), Creator|high-external (4). Low in: Engineering|internal (0), Operations|internal (0).
contextLayers.promptSynthesis: LLM scores 0-5. High for: investor pitches, enterprise proposals, portfolio decks, client-facing work.

unbranded.typicalScenario: User previewing/sharing to external stakeholders. Bases trimmed (play-preview 4→3, share-link-copy 4→3, theme-global 3→2, doc-upload 3→2) to prevent unbranded dominating the score under log-scaling.

export.name: PowerPoint/PDF Export

universalSignals._note: Each universal signal contributes its weight × 0.4 to this feature. Repeatable universals get log-scaled first.

contextLayers.mindsetVector: High in: Data Analytics|high-external (4), Finance|high-external (4), Teacher|high-external (4), Student|high-external (4). Low in: most internal roles (1).
contextLayers.promptSynthesis: LLM scores 0-5. High for: thesis defense, investor meetings, enterprise proposals, anything needing offline delivery.

export.typicalScenario: User tries to download (hits paywall), plays slideshow, uploaded doc that needs to leave the tool.

invite-collab.name: Invite Collaborators

universalSignals._note: Each universal signal contributes its weight × 0.4 to this feature. Repeatable universals get log-scaled first.

contextLayers.mindsetVector: High in: Product|internal (4), Engineering|internal (3), Operations|internal (3), Consulting|internal (3). Low in: Design|high-external (0), Creator|internal (1).
contextLayers.promptSynthesis: LLM scores 0-5. High for: team restructuring, product roadmap, group projects, collaborative work.

invite-collab.typicalScenario: User uses team/we/our language, hits invite gate, works in internal/collaborative context. Repeatable lift comes mainly from invite-attempt and share-link-copy.

analytics.name: Viewer Analytics

universalSignals._note: Each universal signal contributes its weight × 0.4 to this feature. Repeatable universals get log-scaled first.

contextLayers.mindsetVector: High in: Sales|high-external (4), Data Analytics|high-external (4), Leadership|high-external (4). Low in: Student|internal (0), Teacher|internal (0).
contextLayers.promptSynthesis: LLM scores 0-5. High for: enterprise proposals, ROI case studies, partnership pitches — anything where tracking engagement matters.

analytics.typicalScenario: User shares decks, presents to external high-stakes audiences where follow-up tracking matters.

hire-team.name: Hire Our Team

universalSignals._note: Each universal signal contributes its weight × 0.4 to this feature. Repeatable universals get log-scaled first.

contextLayers.mindsetVector: High in: Leadership|high-external (2), Sales|high-external (2), Consulting|high-external (2). Low in: most internal roles (0).
contextLayers.promptSynthesis: LLM scores 0-5. High for: urgent deadlines, struggle language ('help me', 'can't'), high-stakes presentations.

hire-team.typicalScenario: User struggling — repeated undo/redo + deck-regenerate cycles + long doc upload. Log-scaling naturally captures escalation without explicit edit-streak-3 / re-edit-3x aggregates.

distinctBehavior.nudgeFraming: Let us handle it (not 'unlock this feature')
distinctBehavior.routesTo: Service booking flow (not Pro pricing page)
